providers.name: aws
providers.notes: Public Price List Bulk API; no auth. Gate file owns the endpoint and regional fan-out logic.

providers.name: gcp
providers.notes: Cloud Billing Catalog API; public data but API key required for quota tracking. Set GCP_API_KEY in .env; see .env.example. Gate file owns the Compute Engine service id (6F81-5844-456A) and pagination (max pageSize 5000).

providers.name: azure
providers.notes: Retail Prices API; no auth. Gate file owns the OData filter for VMs and pagination.

providers.name: oracle
providers.notes: Public price list API at apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/cetools; no auth, no pagination, single-shot ~3 MB. List price is global per SKU (no per-region split in the data). Compute SKUs live alongside everything else under serviceCategory; modern shapes (E3-E5, X9, A1) price OCPU and memory separately.

providers.name: vultr
providers.notes: Public /v2/plans endpoint; no auth, no pagination, single-shot ~70 KB / 100 plans. Each plan carries monthly_cost, hourly_cost, vcpu_count, ram, disk, bandwidth, type, and locations[] for availability. Price is global per plan (locations[] is availability, not a pricing dimension).

providers.name: linode
providers.notes: Public /v4/linode/types endpoint; no auth, single page, ~42 KB / 75 types. Distinctive schema: each type has a base price.{hourly,monthly} that applies globally PLUS an explicit region_prices[] list of per-region overrides. Currently only br-gru and id-cgk publish overrides; everything else falls back to base. Agent must read region_prices[] before quoting a region-specific number.

providers.name: ibm
providers.notes: Public Global Catalog API at globalcatalog.cloud.ibm.com/api/v1?q=kind:service; no auth, paginated 50/page via top-level `next` URL, ~7 pages / 319 services / ~6 MB total. Catalog spans every IBM Cloud product (Watson, Cloud Paks, IaaS, PaaS, databases). Pricing detail is NOT inlined on catalog entries; per-plan price endpoints exist as follow-ups but are out of v0 scope.
